hook.summary: A woman expresses exhaustion after work and introduces a slot game as the perfect way to unwind.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a pink sweater wipes her brow looking tired, then points excitedly at a phone screen showing a slot machine win.
hook.text_overlay: 仕事終わり どこにも寄れない日
hook.voiceover_transcript: 仕事終わり、どこにも寄れない日。そんな夜はこれ！

scene_flow: A woman appears tired after work next to a mobile slot game interface.
She points to the screen as the slot machine hits a massive 'YOU WON' jackpot of 1.7 billion.
The game logo 'Golden Hoiyah' and download buttons appear as she smiles and points.
audience_proxy: Japanese office workers looking for a rewarding and low-effort mobile game to play after a long day.
